text.tspan: (1) Tom fills in a credit form and requests a creditfrom the bank
Tom posts credit demand in Bank Pod
(2) Lisa fetches and processes credit request
(2) Lisa knows WebID of SME and requests company data (business analysis)
Save Access Authorization in Authorization Registry
Currently done via setting ACL directly
Lisa checks regularly if BWAs are created and available and fetches them from KMU Pod
Omitting the case where no offer is made.
Save Access Authorization in Authorization Registry
for this specific offer (data instance) and order container
Currently done via setting ACLs directly

svg.text: Tom fills in the credit information (credit amount)
200 OK with location of data registration for posting credit requests / demands)
to decide what to do next
[HTTP POST /accessInbox] Access Request in SME's Access Inbox (i.e. object of `interop:hasAccessInbox`)
200 OK with location of data registration for posting document demands
[HTTP POST /documents/demands] Document demand (bwa) in SME's documents/demands container
Redirect from Toms Bank app to Auth Agent
GET Access Request from Access Inbox
Tom looks at the access request in the Auth App
and decides what to do next
Modify ACL Grant access to bwa container [HTTP PUT RESOURCE /businessAssessmnets/businessAssessment/.acl]
Set 'is Access Request Granted' flag in credit demand [/credits/demands/{uuid}]
Redirect from Auth Agent to Toms Bank App
200 OK with location of data registration for posting document demands
[HTTP POST /documents/demands] Document demand (bwa) in Tax's documents/demands container
200 OK with location of data registration for posting BWAs)
200 OK with location of data registration for businessAssessment)
lisa looks at business assessment and evaluates it
[HTTP POST /accessInbox] Access Request in Bank's Access Inbox (i.e. object of `interop:hasAccessInbox`) that Tom/KMU can read credit offer
[HTTP POST /accessInbox] Access Request in Bank's Access Inbox (i.e. object of `interop:hasAccessInbox`) that Tom/KMU can write/post credit order in order container
Redirect from Lisa Bank app to Auth Agent
GET Access Requests from Access Inbox (one for offer and one for order container)
Lisa looks at the access requests in the Auth App
and sets access grants for Tom
Modify ACL Grant write access to order container [HTTP PUT RESOURCE /credits/order/.acl]
Modify ACL Grant read access to offer instance [HTTP PUT RESOURCE /credits/offers/{UUID}.acl]
Redirect from Lisa Auth Agent to Lisa Bank App
200 OK with location of data registration for posting credit order)
